title: Cliselda Fully Assembled Clear Acrylic Display Case, Small Acrylic Box Curiosity Cube Square Plastic Dustproof Showcase for Display Collectible Action Figures Toys (10x10x10 cm)
features: 【No Assembly Required】This acrylic display box is a one-piece construction with no assembly required, simply take off the black bottom lid and place the items you wish to display in the box.

【Acrylic Box with Lid/Dustproof Design】Cliselda Acrylic boxes utilize precision laser cutting technology to make the single-piece of clear acrylic that perfectly matches the black base. These display boxes keep your collectibles dust free and reduce sunlight and UV radiation.
【Best Display Effect】These clear display cases are made of higg quality and clear acrylic to provide a good view of your exhibits. The acrylic boxes are durable and easy to clean.

【Versatile Display Box】The display box is an excellent way to show off your collectibles, artifacts, sports memorabilia, toys, figurines, antiques, jewellery, dolls, action figures, souveniers, models, statues, heirlooms, and sculptures. Can be used at home, in retail stores, museums, or trade shows.
【Dimension】10x10x10 cm(4x4x4 inch) acrylic display case. NOTE: Every box has film protection, please tear before using.
